title: 8 teas to alleviate plantar fasciitis for firefighters
description: Achillea millefolium teas, also known as yarrow tea, can be a helpful remedy for plantar fasciitis. The tea contains compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce swelling and pain in the affected area. The tea also has antioxidants that can help reduce oxidative stress and promote healing.
